recalls.Description: The recall pertains to the DIY Sauna Heater Kit, designed for consumers to build a heating fixture using four separately sold heat-lamp bulbs and a metal enclosure for a DIY sauna. This kit includes a stainless steel cage that weighs approximately 16 lbs and measures 12"H x 12"W x 8"D when assembled, along with necessary assembly materials like screws, ceramic bulb sockets, wire connectors, and a three-prong power cord. The kit is meant to be attached to a custom-built wood frame by the user.
recalls.Title: DIY Cold Plunge Recalls Sauna Heater Kits Due to Fire Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to DIY Cold Plunge via email at orders@diycoldplunge.com or visit www.diycoldplunge.com/pages/recall. You can also find more details by clicking on "Recall Information" at the bottom of their website.

Products.Name: DIY Sauna Heater Kit
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 675 (In addition, about 14 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled DIY Sauna Heater Kit (shown assembled in sauna)
Recalled DIY Sauna Heater Kit (product photo from diycoldplunge.com)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 12 reports of units overheating. No fires or injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Plunge Buddy LLC, doing business as DIY Cold Plunge, of North Mankato, Minnesota

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase online at www.diycoldplunge.com from March 2025 to February 2026, priced between $400 and $500.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to overheating electrical conductors

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease use of the Sauna Heater Kit and register at www.diycoldplunge.com/pages/recall for a full refund. Proof of destruction or disposal may be required, or you can request a prepaid shipping label for returns.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of DIY Sauna Heater Kits due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and register for a refund. Learn more here.
